eval_results.name: commit-generation
eval_results.key_finding: Conventional commit generated: feat(oauth2): add GitHub OAuth2 callback and account model; spec reference in footer

eval_results.name: pr-creation
eval_results.key_finding: PR created with OpenSpec reference, 6 completed task checklist, and source/target branch details

eval_results.name: branch-finisher-integration
eval_results.key_finding: branch-finisher invoked post-merge; feature branch deleted, 2 worktrees removed and pruned

eval_results.name: multi-commit-orchestration
eval_results.key_finding: 12 files grouped into 5 logical commits by domain (models, services, API, tests, frontend); all atomic

eval_results.name: merge-conflict-handling
eval_results.key_finding: Conflict in settings.py detected and reported; resolution steps provided with git merge markers explanation

strengths: Conventional Commit format compliance with proper type and scope
PR descriptions include OpenSpec reference and task completion checklist
Seamless branch-finisher integration for post-merge cleanup
Intelligent multi-file grouping into logical atomic commits
Clear merge conflict detection with actionable resolution guidance
recommendations: Test with squash-merge strategy vs merge-commit for different PR workflows
Add edge cases for PR creation when CI checks are failing
Test branch-finisher integration when worktrees have uncommitted changes
